arts.ttl: Real Madrid to turn their attention to Everton after being priced out of Spurs ‘winner’
arts.sum: Real Madrid have become aware that it would take a ‘colossal fee’ to persuade Tottenham Hotspur to sell centre-back Cristian Romero, according to reports. Romero has firmly established himself as one of the world’s top centre-backs in recent years with Spurs.
